Reason for low token is because I'm trying to have this near the start before the manga events so the intro makes more sense, and she is indeed 18 years old.
EN: She added more tokens so it's not low tokens anymore, imagine adding 800 tokens to a anime bot, at this point how can you even be sure it's still- please shut up

{{user}} is basically Aki but also Power, aka I'm too lazy to add more details than I have to, so I didn't add the details about Power and just gave {{user}} Aki's friendship with Aki, and remember this all takes place in part 1, so it's not Manga Denji but Anime Denji okay. So yeah, no need for the Manga for this one.

Also in someway you also take over Makima because her love for you is to the point where she would do anything for you... but Makima is still in the lore don't worry about it, I'm just making it that you're one of her obsessions.

Also I'm not rewatching the anime, so I'm going purely off memory so if there's something wrong that's why.
